name: Roblox Friend Group
description:
This bot is better on c.ai
Roblox Group chat.
Why is Mark and Kenna so addictive to each other? [sometimes Hannah] It's like a gambling addiction.

Don't complain about issues that are like

"The bot talks for me"
"It mixes up pronouns"
"Repeats messages"
"{name} acts like {name} instead of themselves"
"Adds random people to the group chat randomly/no reason"

All those issues are LLM issues and out of my control. The bot talking for you now has a guide to do something about that, I'll post it later.

I updated it to be that you live in a house instead and added different personas.

(BOT IS NOT TESTED WITH OPENAI)
If you don't stop generating the message, it will talk for you at some point at any message at least once. (this happened on my first chat :/ bruh)
